risk_rationale: The Children's Protection Act of 2021 requires regulatory impact analysis on children, focusing on safety and health. This aligns with existing minor protection standards but does not introduce new specific requirements that conflict with TikTok's current baseline.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Screen time management with 60-min default for <18, with bypass code.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Regulatory impact analysis on children considering safety and health.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The requirement for regulatory impact analysis is procedural and does not directly conflict with existing screen time management policies.

remediations.title: Enhance Regulatory Impact Analysis Procedures
remediations.description: Develop internal procedures to ensure compliance with regulatory impact analysis requirements focusing on children's safety and health.
acceptance_criteria: Documented procedure for regulatory impact analysis
Training for relevant teams on new procedures

business_impact: Minimal business impact as the requirement is procedural and aligns with existing compliance efforts.
recommended_actions: Develop internal procedures for regulatory impact analysis.
Train compliance teams on new procedures.
Monitor for any further legislative developments.
